infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
HEALTHY

All 10 collectors are enabled and producing fresh data. The single broker (Alpaca Paper) is properly configured and linked to the active portfolio. No data gaps detected during today's market session (2026-03-11, Wednesday). Market closed at 21:00 UTC; extended hours data flowing normally for high-liquidity instruments.

## Collectors
| ID | Type | Symbol | TF | Disabled | Data Fresh | Priority | Notes |
|----|------|--------|----|----------|------------|----------|-------|
| `2a8681ef` | alpaca | SLV | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Important | Active task uses SLV metrics |
| `e5125995` | alpaca | GLD | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Important | 9 active tasks depend on GLD data |
| `c00fd831` | alpaca | AAPL | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Important | 1 active task depends on AAPL data |
| `f60d4dce` | alpaca | IWM | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Low | No active tasks use IWM |
| `9c3ba4ef` | alpaca | XLE | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Important | 2 active tasks depend on XLE data |
| `3d04a943` | alpaca | NVDA | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Low | NVDA task is disabled |
| `9c417caa` | alpaca | QQQ | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Low | No active tasks use QQQ |
| `999b208d` | alpaca | SPY | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (21:45Z) | Low | No active tasks use SPY directly |
| `35cf414b` | alpaca | ESTC | 15min | No | ✅ Yes (20:00Z) | Low | No active tasks use 15min timeframe; no extended hours data (normal) |
| `ab739989` | alpaca | ESTC | 5min | No | ✅ Yes (20:00Z) | Important | 2 active tasks depend on ESTC data; no extended hours data (normal) |

**Notes:**
- ESTC 5min/15min latest data at 20:00Z is normal — lower-liquidity stock with limited extended-hours trading.
- All high-liquidity ETFs/stocks (GLD, SPY, QQQ, SLV, IWM, XLE, AAPL, NVDA) producing data into extended hours through 21:45Z.

## Data Completeness (Market Session 14:30–21:00 UTC)
| Instrument | Points | Gaps | Status |
|------------|--------|------|--------|
| GLD | 79/79 | 0 | ✅ Complete |
| XLE | 78/78 | 0 | ✅ Complete |
| ESTC-5min | 67/67 | 0 | ✅ Complete |

## Brokers
| ID | Name | Type | Status | Notes |
|----|------|------|--------|-------|
| `ed622468` | Alpaca Paper | alpaca | ✅ Connected | Linked to `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` via pb `81234300`. Config: paper API, SIP data feed. |

## Portfolio
| ID | Name | Equity | Broker | Models | Notes |
|----|------|--------|--------|--------|-------|
| `447e2d45` | paper-alpha-01 | $40,000 | Alpaca Paper (`ed622468`) | 0 (empty) | Ready for model promotion. |

## Active Optimization Tasks (14 enabled)
| Asset | Count | Task IDs | Metric Dependencies |
|-------|-------|----------|---------------------|
| GLD | 9 tasks | 03255fc1, eb61f98b, 8b877f86, eb1b1e97, 9ac8eba0, e3017490, 32062f72, a72da2ed, b1936192 | `alpaca.gld.5min.*` |
| XLE | 2 tasks | 8269132d, 880c9eb3 | `alpaca.xle.5min.*` |
| ESTC | 2 tasks | 4830e9b4, b4a94bf2 | `alpaca.estc.5min.*` |
| AAPL | 1 task | 98dd3981 | `alpaca.aapl.5min.*` |

## Active Issues
| Component | Issue | Since | Impact | Action Taken |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|--------------|
| *(none)* | — | — | — | — |

## Resolved Issues (last 7 days)
| Component | Issue | Duration | Resolution |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------|
| *(none recent)* | — | — | — |

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## ⚠️ HEADLINE: No New Evals Since 02:15Z — Fresh Backtests Show 61694274 Back Above 0.80, Emerging Safety Models Climbing

No new stored evaluations since the 02:15Z batch. Fresh real-time backtests show several significant movements:
- **61694274** has bounced BACK to 0.802 (from stored 0.793) — may restart 1/5 on next eval
- **fd60312c** climbing to 0.743 (from 0.718) — safest IS DD ever (8.34%)
- **001b9ef2** climbing to 0.750 (from 0.730) — highest ops model (103) with safe IS DD (8.93%)
- **f601bbb5** (EXP-22 NEW) enters at 0.704 with IS DD 8.93% — strong day-1 showing

**54b33aea remains the sole pipeline leader at 3/5.** Next eval ~Mar 12 02:15Z is critical (eval 4).

## Promotion Pipeline

### `[[model/54b33aea]]` — ⭐⭐⭐ PIPELINE LEADER — 3/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80

| Metric | Value | Assessment |
|--------|-------|------------|
| **16w Eval Trajectory** | 0.811 → 0.832 → **0.833** ⬆️ | Consistent uptrend |
| **OOS Expanding** | **0.811** (stable 2 evals) | Genuine baseline |
| **Fresh 16w BT** | **0.833** | Confirms stored eval |
| **IS DD** | **13.38%** (1.62% headroom) ✅ | Tight but within limit |
| **OOS DD** | 9.05% | Good |
| **cecpp** | 0.894 (16w), 0.910 (OOS) | Strong profit consistency |
| **Ops** | 61 (49W/2L) on 16w, 67 total OOS | Active trader |
| **4w Activity** | score=0.288, 26 ops | ✅ ACTIVELY TRADING |
| **1w Activity** | 2 ops | Normal (light trading week) |
| **Sharpe** | 10.87 | Excellent |
| **Expectancy** | $17.35/trade | Strong |
| **IS Backtest** | score=0.703, DD=13.38%, ops=244, WR=66.7% | Genuine cross-regime edge |
| **IS-OOS Gap** | 15.4% (score), 0% (DD) | Score gap from regime amplification; DD stable |

**Assessment:** Trajectory remains upward. Score boost from loser-shedding artifact (losers 7→2 on rolling window) inflates 16w, but OOS expanding at 0.811 confirms genuine quality above threshold. Active trading (26 ops in 4w) is the key differentiator — only top model generating new closed trades. **Will recommend promotion at 5/5. Probability: 55%.**

### Former Track B — 61694274/2704110c — BOUNCING BACK?

| Model | Task | Stored 16w | Fresh BT | OOS Expand | IS DD | 4w Ops | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|----------|------------|-------|--------|--------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.793 ↓ | **0.802** ↑ | 0.813 (stable) | **10.28%** ✅ | 5 | May bounce above 0.80 on next eval. But only 5 ops in 4w — barely trading. |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.793 ↓ | ERROR | — | **10.28%** ✅ | — | Twin. Assume same trajectory. |

**Eval trajectory (61694274):** 0.833 → 0.827 → 0.806 → 0.806 → **0.793** → (fresh: 0.802). Window rotation may push next eval back above 0.80. But with only 5 ops in 4w, sustainability is questionable. If it does cross 0.80, it restarts at 1/5.

### Former Track C — 198d0c1f/289705b1 — NEAR THRESHOLD

| Model | Task | Stored 16w | Fresh BT | IS DD | 4w Ops | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|----------|-------|--------|--------|
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.797 ↓ | **0.799** | **13.38%** ✅ | — | Just below 0.80. Best IS-OOS gap (1.2%). |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.794 ↓ | **0.796** | **13.38%** ✅ | — | Twin. |

### IS DD-Blocked (Score ≥0.80 but IS DD ≥15%)

| Model | Task | Fresh BT | IS DD | OOS DD | cecpp | Status |
|-------|------|----------|-------|--------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | **0.856** | **18.35%** ❌ | 4.04% | 0.972 | Rock-solid RECORD. 100% WR. Permanently blocked. |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | **0.813** ↑ | **19.27%** ❌ | 9.44% | 0.914 | Bounced back but DD blocks. |

## Emerging Safety Track — Models Climbing Toward 0.80 with Best IS DD

These models are actively trading and climbing. They represent the **future promotion pipeline** — if they cross 0.80 and sustain 5 evals, they'd be the safest promotable models ever.

| Model | Task | Fresh BT | Stored Eval | IS DD | IS Headroom | 4w Ops | Trend | ETA to 0.80 |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|--------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/fd60312c]]` ⭐ | `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | **0.743** ↑ | 0.718 (1 eval) | **8.34%** ⭐⭐ | 6.66% | 24 | +3.5% from stored | ~2-3 weeks? |
| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` ⭐ | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | **0.750** ↑ | 0.730 (1 eval) | **8.93%** ⭐ | 6.07% | 28 | +2.7% from stored | ~2-3 weeks? |
| `[[model/2d5307c8]]` | `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 | **0.705** ↑ | 0.682 (1 eval) | 9.79% ✅ | 5.21% | — | +3.4% from stored | ~3-4 weeks? |
| `[[model/f601bbb5]]` 🆕 | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | **0.704** | — (no 16w) | **8.93%** ⭐ | 6.07% | — | NEW (day 1) | Unknown |
| `[[model/977e04dd]]` | `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | 0.612 ↑ | 0.580 (1 eval) | **8.43%** ⭐⭐ | 6.57% | — | +5.5% from stored | ~4-5 weeks? |

**Key insight:** These models are ALL actively trading (fd60312c 24 ops in 4w, 001b9ef2 28 ops in 4w). They won't suffer the front-loading decay that killed Track B/C. If they reach 0.80, they'll sustain it.

## New Experiments — Day-1 Assessment

### `[[model/f601bbb5]]` (EXP-22, Subgraph Crossover) 🆕 — PROMISING

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| OOS BT | score=0.704, DD=12.11%, 36 ops, WR=92.6%, cecpp=0.891 |
| IS BT | score=0.668, DD=**8.93%**, 381 ops, WR=63.6%, cecpp=0.875 |
| OOS Expanding | score=0.644, 38 ops, DD=12.11%, cecpp=0.904 |

Strong entry. IS DD 8.93% with 381 IS ops provides good statistical grounding. IS score 0.668 → OOS 0.704 shows regime amplification but the gap is modest (5.4%). 36 OOS ops is low but growing. **Monitor closely — if it maintains current trajectory, it joins the emerging safety track.**

### `[[model/3d1dccab]]` (EXP-23, cecpp+smooth_step scorer) 🆕 — INTRIGUING

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| OOS BT | score=0.348, DD=5.50%, 21 ops, WR=91.7%, exp=$48.10 |
| IS BT | score=0.752, DD=10.81%, 184 ops, WR=69.7%, cecpp=0.922 |

Excellent IS quality (0.752, DD 10.81%) but only 21 OOS ops — trade_count_factor crushes the score. Extraordinary per-trade expectancy ($48.10). **If ops grow, score could jump dramatically.** Very early but IS profile is one of the best ever. Keep watching.

### `[[model/606aff9f]]` (EXP-23) 🆕 — JUNK

IS: score=0.000, ops=12647, DD=7.70%, negative expectancy (-$0.64), profit=-$8,027. **Hyperactive loss machine.** Discard.

### `[[model/9081d943]]` (EXP-24, XLE tuned) 🆕 — BREAKEVEN

OOS: score=0.284, 215 ops, DD=4.63%, cecpp=0.935, exp=$0.14. Many trades but essentially breakeven. XLE is hard.

## XLE Pipeline — `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16

| Model | Fresh BT | DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Assessment |
|-------|---------|-----|-------|-----|-----|------------|
| `[[model/9db02fc1]]` 🆕 | **0.682** ⭐ | 5.22% | 0.967 | 43 | 81.1% | Best XLE score ever! But IS: 0.284, DD 25% — IS terrible. Skeptical. |
| `[[model/14064f48]]` | 0.383 | 2.69% | 0.969 | 28 | 90.9% | XLE quality king. Score limited by ops. |
| `[[model/6870f1e7]]` | — | — | — | — | — | IS negative. |
| `[[model/4376d5b3]]` | 0.274 ↓ | — | — | — | — | Declining. |

**9db02fc1 note:** OOS outperformance vs IS (0.682 vs 0.284) is a RED FLAG. This usually indicates a lucky OOS period, not genuine quality. However, cecpp 0.967 and DD 5.22% are extraordinary. Need more evals to distinguish luck from skill.

## Monitoring (Promising)

| Model | Task | Fresh BT | IS DD | OOS DD | Ops | Trend | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|--------|-----|-------|-------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | **0.798** | 14.03% ⚠️ | **3.77%** | 41 | Volatile (0.649→0.782→0.738→0.805→0.798→0.798→0.787→fresh 0.798) | Best OOS DD ever. Borderline IS DD. |
| `[[model/4e87830e]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.767 | 14.83% ⚠️ | 9.44% | 53 | Below threshold | Borderline IS DD blocks anyway. |
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.759 | 10.28% ✅ | 13.03% | 55 | Declining | Safe IS DD but falling. |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | ~0.752 | 9.76% ✅ | 13.25% | 42 | Stable | Task disabled. Low score. |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | ~0.693 | **9.64%** ✅ | **8.40%** | — | Volatile | Best cross-regime safety. Far from 0.80. |
| `[[model/64a144a1]]` | `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | 0.535 | 12.83% | — | 82 | Slowly rising | ESTC best. Deadline Mar 15. |
| `[[model/99f035df]]` | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | ~0.731 (OOS) | — | 9.31% | — | Early | Promising twin of 001b9ef2. |
| `[[model/cfe32d4c]]` | `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 | ERROR | — | 13.32% | — | Very early | Walk-forward. Few ops. |

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | Fresh BT | Stored Eval | Trend | Key Concern | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/c9647008]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.624 | 0.604 | ↓↓↓ | 3+ consecutive below 0.65. DEMOTION MET. | No | FAILED. |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.771 ↑? | 0.745 | ↓↓ | IS DD 19.20% blocks regardless. Fresh BT looks higher but score volatile. | No | IS DD BLOCKED. |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | ERROR | 0.731 | ↓↓ | IS DD 15.25% blocks. Accelerating decline. | No | BLOCKED + declining. |
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.759 | 0.744 | ↓ | Gradual decline. Fresh BT higher than stored (window rotation). | No | IS DD safe but score dropping. |

## Failed / Not Ready

| Category | Models | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| NSGA-III ESTC | `[[model/f1df6a17]]`, `[[model/8b53300f]]` | Stable but far from threshold. |
| EXP-10 GLD (failing) | `[[model/d314d811]]`, `[[model/5aedf294]]`, `[[model/73701688]]` | Dead. |
| SLV (DOA) | `[[model/7c530efd]]`, `[[model/ba5917fb]]`, `[[model/c19bd50b]]` | Task disabled. |
| EXP-19 AAPL | `[[model/6c2bc62a]]` (0.262), `[[model/0a4cc9b7]]` (0.248) | Grace period to Mar 14. 0a4cc9b7 has negative exp. |
| EXP-18 walk-fwd | `[[model/8878d3d1]]` (0.005, 1 op) | Nearly dead. |
| EXP-23 junk | `[[model/606aff9f]]` (neg IS exp) | IS loss machine. Discard. |
| Baseline/misc | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.529), `[[model/31bff7f5]]` (0.546) | Reference. |

## Summary

- **Total models in system:** 92 (+2 since last report at 12:00Z)
- **Above 0.80 on fresh BT:** 5 (54b33aea, 4fc2c04e, 50c0ac0b, 61694274, f601bbb5-nope wait)
  - Actually: 4fc2c04e (0.856), 54b33aea (0.833), 50c0ac0b (0.813), 61694274 (0.802)
- **IS DD-eligible (≥0.80 AND IS DD <15%):** 2 (54b33aea, 61694274)
- **On promotion track:** `[[model/54b33aea]]` at **3/5** ⭐⭐⭐ (only candidate)
- **Emerging safety track:** 5 models climbing (fd60312c, 001b9ef2, 2d5307c8, f601bbb5, 977e04dd)
- **New models assessed:** 4 (f601bbb5 ✅, 3d1dccab ✅, 606aff9f ❌, 9081d943 🟡)
- **Degrading models flagged:** 4 (none live)
- **Failed:** c9647008 (demotion threshold met)

## Promotion Timeline

| Scenario | Model(s) | Earliest | Probability | Dependency |
|----------|----------|----------|-------------|------------|
| **54b33aea holds** | `[[model/54b33aea]]` | **~Mar 13** | **55%** | 2 more evals ≥0.80 (eval 4 on Mar 12 02:15Z). Active trading sustains score. |
| 61694274 recovers | `[[model/61694274]]` | ~Mar 16+ | **15%** ↑ | Fresh BT at 0.802. May bounce back on next eval. Restarts at 1/5 if so. |
| Emerging safety breakout | `[[model/fd60312c]]`/`[[model/001b9ef2]]` | ~Mar 18+ | **15%** | Climbing fast (+2-4% between evals). Need to reach 0.80 + 5 consecutive. |
| No promotion by Mar 16 | — | — | **15%** | 54b33aea drops below 0.80, others don't reach threshold. |

## Backtest Cache (Updated Mar 11 18:15Z)

### 54b33aea (PIPELINE LEADER — 3/5) ⭐
| Period | Score | DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Sharpe |
|--------|-------|----|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|
| **16w (fresh)** | **0.833** | 9.05% | 0.894 | 61 (49W/2L) | 96.1% | $17.35 | 10.87 |
| **OOS expanding** | **0.811** | 9.05% | 0.910 | 67 (50W/7L) | 87.7% | — | 9.58 |
| **In-Sample** | 0.703 | **13.38%** | 0.908 | 244 | 66.7% | $7.97 | 6.80 |

### f601bbb5 (NEW EXP-22) 🆕
| Period | Score | DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Sharpe |
|--------|-------|----|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|
| **16w (fresh)** | **0.704** | 12.11% | 0.891 | 36 (25W/2L) | 92.6% | $28.90 | 7.51 |
| **OOS expanding** | 0.644 | 12.11% | 0.904 | 38 | — | — | — |
| **In-Sample** | 0.668 | **8.93%** | 0.875 | 381 | 63.6% | $4.49 | 6.40 |

### 3d1dccab (NEW EXP-23) 🆕
| Period | Score | DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Sharpe |
|--------|-------|----|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|
| **16w (fresh)** | 0.348 | 5.50% | 0.892 | 21 | 91.7% | $48.10 | 4.87 |
| **In-Sample** | **0.752** | **10.81%** | 0.922 | 184 | 69.7% | $9.02 | 7.12 |

### IS DD Risk Matrix (Updated)

| IS DD Range | Models | Fresh BT Score | Promotable? |
|-------------|--------|---------------|-------------|
| **8.34%** (6.66% headroom) | `[[model/fd60312c]]` | 0.743 ↑ | Would be — SAFEST ever |
| **8.43%** (6.57% headroom) | `[[model/977e04dd]]` | 0.612 ↑ | Would be — very safe |
| **8.93%** (6.07% headroom) | `[[model/001b9ef2]]`, `[[model/f601bbb5]]` 🆕 | 0.750 ↑ / 0.704 🆕 | Would be — safe |
| **9.79%** (5.21% headroom) | `[[model/2d5307c8]]` | 0.705 ↑ | Would be — safe |
| **10.28%** (4.72% headroom) | `[[model/61694274]]` | **0.802** ↑ | Yes — if stable |
| **10.81%** (4.19% headroom) | `[[model/3d1dccab]]` 🆕 | 0.348 (few ops) | TBD — needs more ops |
| **13.38%** (1.62% headroom) | **`[[model/54b33aea]]`** ⭐ | **0.833** | **YES — 3/5 consecutive** |
| **15%+** | 4fc2c04e, 50c0ac0b, 0eca618b, 6e5c665f, d6e58262 | Various | BLOCKED |

## Active Models
| Portfolio | Model | Allocation | Enabled Since | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Orders (24h) | Status |
|-----------|-------|------------|---------------|-------|--------|-------|------------|--------------|--------|
| — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | Portfolio empty. All promotion clocks reset by GLD dip (except 54b33aea). |

## Promotion Pipeline (Updated Mar 11 — Data Through Mar 11 02:17Z Eval)

### ⚠️ GLD CORRELATED DIP #5 — ALL CLOCKS RESET (Except 54b33aea)

The Mar 11 eval batch showed widespread score declines across ALL GLD models. This is the 5th confirmed correlated GLD eval swing event.

### 54b33aea — ⭐⭐⭐ NEW PIPELINE LEADER — 3/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Status |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------------|-------|--------|--------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | 0.811→0.832→**0.833** ⬆️ | **3/5** | 13.38% ✅ | 9.05% | ONLY model that held through GLD dip. Active trader (10W/6L, $83). IS-OOS gap 15.2% (concern). Awaiting Analyst assessment. |

### Track B — RESET (4/5 → 0/5)
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory (last 3) | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | Status |
|-------|------|-------------------------|-------------------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10 GLD) | 0.806→0.806→**0.793** ↓ | **0/5** (was 4/5) | 10.28% ✅ | GLD dip. Promotion blocked. |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10 GLD) | 0.806→0.806→**0.793** ↓ | **0/5** (was 4/5) | 10.28% ✅ | Twin. Same trajectory. |

### Track C — RESET (2/5 → 0/5)
| Model | Task | Latest Score | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|--------------------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | **0.797** ↓ | **0/5** (was 2/5) | 13.38% ✅ | GLD dip. Best quality (1.2% IS-OOS gap). |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | **0.794** ↓ | **0/5** (was 2/5) | 13.38% ✅ | Twin. |

### Track A — STALE (0/5, No Recent Evals)
| Model | Task | Latest Score | Last Eval | IS DD | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|----|-------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11 GLD) | 0.738 | Mar 5 | 14.03% ⚠️ | No eval since Mar 5. Investigation requested. |

### IS DD-Blocked
| Model | Score | IS DD | Block Margin |

| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.856 (record) | 18.35% | 3.35% over |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | 0.784 ↓ | 19.20% | 4.20% over |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | 0.801 | 19.27% | 4.27% over |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.773 | 15.25% | 0.25% over |

## Recent Changes
| Date | Portfolio | Model | Action | Reason |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| 2026-03-11 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | GLD correlated dip #5 reset all clocks. 54b33aea only survivor at 3/5. Awaiting Analyst assessment. |
| 2026-03-10 | — | — | HOLD | Track B at 4/5 — pre-promotion readiness verified. |
| 2026-03-06 | — | `[[model/33e3f843]]` | Formal demotion | 4 consecutive below 0.65. Task disabled. |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100% (portfolio empty)
- Portfolio equity: $40,000 (newly configured)
- Portfolio-broker link: 81234300 verified and ready
- RAMP_UP lifecycle: understood (DISABLED → RAMP_UP → ACTIVE)
- Models pending promotion: 0 (closest: `[[model/54b33aea]]` at **3/5** consecutive — 2 evals away)
- Estimated earliest promotion: **~Mar 13** (if 54b33aea holds; pending Analyst recommendation)

## Key Risks
1. **GLD concentration**: ALL top candidates remain GLD. 5th correlated dip confirms systemic correlation.
2. **54b33aea IS-OOS gap**: 15.2% gap is a concern — may indicate regime inflation. Awaiting Analyst review.
3. **7f7ac2e4 eval gap**: No eval since Mar 5 — needs investigation.
4. **New models untested**: 5 new models from EXP-18/20/21/22 need evaluation cycles.

## Next Critical Event
**Wed Mar 12 ~02:15Z**: Eval 4 for `[[model/54b33aea]]`. If ≥0.80: 4/5 consecutive. If Track B/C bounce back above 0.80, they restart at 1/5.

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## ⚠️ HEADLINE: ALL GLD 16w Tracks Dropped Below 0.80 — 54b33aea Now Leads at 3/5

The Mar 11 eval batch saw a systemic GLD front-loading correction. ALL models on promotion tracks (61694274, 2704110c, 198d0c1f, 289705b1) dropped below 0.80 on 16w rolling. Multi-horizon analysis confirms this is **NOISE** (OOS expanding stable at 0.813, 4w flat at 0.034). Only actively-trading models sustain scores.

`[[model/54b33aea]]` (EXP-14, disabled task) is now the **lead promotion candidate** at 3/5 consecutive ≥0.80.

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Best Fitness | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-------------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III GLD) | graph | 0.510 | `[[model/198d0c1f]]` (16w: **0.797** ❌) | 5 | Former best task. 16w scores dropped below 0.80. OOS expanding stable. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned) | graph | 0.645 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.855** RECORD, IS DD blocked) | 4 | Record score, rock-solid. IS DD 18.35% blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD baseline) | graph | 0.640 | `[[model/61694274]]` (16w: **0.793** ❌) | 9 | SAFEST IS DD (10.28%). 16w dropped below 0.80 — front-loading. |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` (EXP-22: subgraph-xover) 🆕 | graph | **0.818** ⭐ | `[[model/d6e58262]]` (IS: **0.821**) | 3 | **HIGHEST fitness AND highest day-1 IS score EVER.** IS DD 19.33% though. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` (EXP-17: feat+baseline) 🆕 | graph | 0.586 | `[[model/977e04dd]]` (IS: **0.774**, DD **8.43%** ⭐) | 2 | **LOWEST IS DD EVER** across all tasks. |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` (EXP-16: XLE NSGA-III) | graph | 0.244 | `[[model/14064f48]]` (16w: 0.383) | 6 | XLE best is 14064f48 (cecpp 0.951, DD 4.36% OOS). New model 9db02fc1 mediocre. |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` (EXP-21: DD-weighted) 🆕 | graph | 0.544 | `[[model/5d988945]]` (IS: 0.673) | 4 | Pop survived on GLD! DD-weighted scorer viable. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` (EXP-20: pop=300) 🆕 | graph | 0.338 | `[[model/001b9ef2]]` (IS: 0.641, DD 8.93%) | 3 | Low DD models emerging from larger pop. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: ESTC NSGA-III) | graph | 0.251 | `[[model/64a144a1]]` (16w: 0.534) | 5 | Still slowly rising. Deadline Mar 15. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC) | graph | 0.378 | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.537) | 5 | Stable control. |

## Underperforming Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` (EXP-19: AAPL) 🆕 | graph | ~0.24 | Negative Sharpe, high DD | 2 | ⚠️ Day 1. Grace period until Mar 14. |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` (EXP-18: walk-forward) 🆕 | graph | ~0.01 | Very few ops (2-4) | 2 | Walk-forward optimizer is slow. Expected. Keep monitoring. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | graph | — | Collapsed | 2 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 9 |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | graph | — | IS DD ≥19% | 5 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 9. BUT 54b33aea is now lead candidate! |

## Active Experiments

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | Control | 2026-02-13 | ✅ Stable. Pop 200/200. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | GLD viable long-short | 2026-02-27 | ⚠️ 61694274 dropped to 0.793 (0/5). OOS expanding 0.813 stable. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | Tuned scorer on GLD | 2026-03-02 | ⭐⭐⭐ 4fc2c04e at 0.855 (RECORD, IS DD blocked). Pop 200/200. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | NSGA-III on ESTC | 2026-03-03 | 🟡 64a144a1 at 0.534. Slowly rising. Deadline Mar 15. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | NSGA-III + GLD | 2026-03-06 | ⚠️ All models dropped below 0.80 on 16w. OOS expanding stable. |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | XLE diversification | 2026-03-09 | 🟡 6 models, best 0.383. 14064f48 has excellent OOS quality. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | Improved features + baseline scorer | 2026-03-10 | ⭐⭐ LOWEST IS DD EVER (8.34-8.43%). Scores 0.762-0.774. |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 | Walk-forward optimizer | 2026-03-10 | 🟡 Recovered from stuck. 2 models, very early. |
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` EXP-19 | AAPL diversification | 2026-03-10 | ⚠️ Poor day-1 results. Grace period Mar 14. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | Larger pop=300, 75 gens | 2026-03-10 | 🟡 3 models, IS 0.641 best, DD 8.93%. |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 | DD-weighted scorer on GLD | 2026-03-10 | ✅ 4 models, pop survived! DD-weighted viable on GLD. |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | Subgraph crossover | 2026-03-10 | ⭐⭐⭐ HIGHEST DAY-1 SCORES (IS 0.821). Fitness 0.818. |
| `[[task/03255fc1]]` EXP-23 🆕 | cecpp + smooth_step DD scorer | **2026-03-11** | 🆕 Just created. Leverages PR #103. |
| `[[task/8269132d]]` EXP-24 🆕 | XLE lower trade_count_factor | **2026-03-11** | 🆕 Just created. min=25 for sparse XLE strategies. |

## Task Optimization Health

| Task | Best Fitness | Pop Size | Errors | Health |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|--------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.510 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Healthy |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.640 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Healthy |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | 0.645 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Recovered |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | 0.244 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Growing |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | 0.251 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Low fitness |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | 0.378 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Stable |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | 0.586 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Producing |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 | 0.588 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Recovered |
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` EXP-19 | 0.261 | 200/200 | 0 | ⚠️ Low fitness |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | 0.338 | 300/300 | 0 | ✅ Exploring |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 | 0.544 | 200/200 | 0 | ✅ Healthy |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | **0.818** ⭐ | 200/200 | 0 | ⭐ Outstanding |
| `[[task/03255fc1]]` EXP-23 | — | — | — | 🆕 Just created |
| `[[task/8269132d]]` EXP-24 | — | — | — | 🆕 Just created |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. ⚠️ Systemic GLD 16w Drop — Front-Loading Rolling-Window Effect
ALL GLD models on promotion tracks simultaneously dropped below 0.80 on 16w rolling. Multi-horizon analysis confirms NOISE: OOS expanding scores stable (0.813), 4w flat (0.034). The rolling window is shedding early profitable trades while front-loading means no new closed trades replace them.

### 2. 🔄 54b33aea Becomes Lead Candidate (3/5)
The ONLY model with ≥0.80 that actively closes trades. Trajectory: 0.811→0.832→0.833. IS DD 13.38% ✅. 2 more evals for promotion (~Mar 13).

### 3. ⭐ EXP-22 (Subgraph Crossover) Shows Remarkable Day-1 Results
Best fitness 0.818 and IS score 0.821 — both records for day-1 performance. Confirms subgraph crossover finds novel topologies. IS DD 19.33% is the challenge.

### 4. ⭐ EXP-17 Produces Lowest IS DD Models Ever
IS DD 8.34-8.43% with scores 0.762-0.774. SAFEST models we've produced. If scores push above 0.80, they'd have 6.6% IS DD headroom.

### 5. ✅ EXP-21 DD-Weighted Scorer Works on GLD
Population survived (unlike ESTC EXP-9 death spiral). DD-weighted scorer is viable on GLD.

### 6. 🆕 Two New Experiments Created (EXP-23, EXP-24)
- EXP-23: cecpp directly in scorer + smooth_step DD penalty (leverages PR #103).
- EXP-24: XLE with lower trade_count_factor min=25 to unlock sparse strategies.

## Infrastructure
- **14 active tasks** + 11 disabled = 25 total
- **~72 workers projected** (13×5 + 1×5 for pop=300)
- **0 errors across ALL tasks** ✅
- **4 instruments active:** ESTC, GLD, XLE, AAPL
